name: instant-api — SLO POST /deploy/new success rate < 99.0% (30m)
description: Page when the rolling-30m success rate of POST /deploy/new drops below the 30-day SLO target (99.0%). Success = httpResponseCode < 500. /deploy/new is the bundle wedge — multi-step Kaniko + k8s + cert-manager flow → looser threshold than /db/new but still critical for monetization. Sourced from Transaction events emitted by the Fiber NR middleware.

nrql.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) < 500) FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri = '/deploy/new'
